title: deparia conilii var. angustata
intro: Deparia conilii var. angustata, also known as the Deparia conilii narrow-leaved variety, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Deparia conilii var. angustata include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular health. Deparia conilii var. angustata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
